Example_EN: They claim that the new app saves a lot of time.
Example_CN: 他们声称这款新应用能节省大量时间。

Collocation: in a relationship;close relationship;build a relationship
Example_EN: A good relationship with your team makes work easier.
Example_CN: 和团队保持良好关系会让工作更轻松。
MemoryTip: relation + ship：关系的“船”，一起航行。

Example_EN: She plans to travel around Europe next summer.
Example_CN: 她打算明年夏天去欧洲旅行。

Example_EN: I really enjoy reading on rainy afternoons.
Example_CN: 我很喜欢在下雨的午后阅读。

Collocation: cause of death;sudden death;life and death
Example_EN: The novel deals with love and death honestly.
Example_CN: 这部小说坦诚地写到爱与死亡。
MemoryTip: death：与 dead 同源，名词形式。

Collocation: nice day;nice to meet you;nice of you
Example_EN: It was nice of you to bring coffee for everyone.
Example_CN: 你给大家带咖啡，真是贴心。

Example_EN: Please check the total amount on the bill again.
Example_CN: 请再核对一下账单上的总金额。
MemoryTip: a + mount：堆成一座小“山”的量。

Example_EN: Daily practice will improve your spoken English.
Example_CN: 每天练习会提高你的口语。
MemoryTip: im + prove：证明自己变得更好。

Collocation: take a picture;in the picture;picture yourself
Example_EN: Can you take a picture of us near the river?
Example_CN: 你能在河边给我们拍张照吗？
MemoryTip: picture：脑子或纸上“画”出来的像。

Example_EN: The boy next door plays football every weekend.
Example_CN: 隔壁的男孩每个周末都踢足球。

Example_EN: Many people regard her as a natural leader.
Example_CN: 许多人把她看作天生的领导者。

Example_EN: She works for an international aid organization.
Example_CN: 她在一家国际援助组织工作。
MemoryTip: organize 的名词：把人事物组织起来。

Example_EN: The children looked happy after the school trip.
Example_CN: 孩子们春假后看起来很开心。

Example_EN: A young couple moved into the flat upstairs.
Example_CN: 一对年轻夫妇搬进了楼上的公寓。

Example_EN: Please act quickly if you smell smoke.
Example_CN: 如果闻到烟味，请迅速行动。

Example_EN: The shop offers a wide range of local snacks.
Example_CN: 这家店有各种本地小吃。
MemoryTip: range：像山脉一样延伸的范围。

Example_EN: Customers care about the quality of the food here.
Example_CN: 顾客很在意这里食物的质量。

Example_EN: Our class project looks at urban green spaces.
Example_CN: 我们班的课题研究城市绿地。

Example_EN: Please sit round the table and open your books.
Example_CN: 请围着桌子坐下并打开书。

Collocation: job opportunity;take the opportunity;miss an opportunity
Example_EN: This internship is a great opportunity for you.
Example_CN: 这次实习对你是个很好的机会。

Example_EN: Turn left at the end of this quiet road.
Example_CN: 走到这条安静小路的尽头再左转。

Collocation: in accord with;of one's own accord;peace accord
Example_EN: His actions were in accord with the school rules.
Example_CN: 他的行为符合校规。

Example_EN: Please make a list of everything we need to buy.
Example_CN: 请把我们要买的东西列成清单。

Example_EN: I wish you a safe journey home tonight.
Example_CN: 祝你今晚一路平安回家。

Example_EN: It was raining; therefore we stayed indoors.
Example_CN: 下着雨，因此我们待在室内。
MemoryTip: there + fore：因为前面那样，所以……

Example_EN: Do you wear glasses when you drive at night?
Example_CN: 你晚上开车时戴眼镜吗？

Example_EN: The club needs to raise funds for new equipment.
Example_CN: 俱乐部需要筹集资金购买新设备。

Collocation: have a rest;the rest of;rest on
Example_EN: You should have a short rest after lunch.
Example_CN: 午饭后你应该稍作休息。
MemoryTip: rest：停下喘口气，或剩余部分。

Example_EN: The kids were playing loudly in the garden.
Example_CN: 孩子们在花园里大声玩耍。
MemoryTip: kid：口语里的小孩子；也表说笑。

Example_EN: Tourism is a major industry in this coastal town.
Example_CN: 旅游业是这座海滨小镇的主要产业。

Example_EN: Good education opens many doors for young people.
Example_CN: 良好的教育为年轻人打开许多扇门。
MemoryTip: educate 的名词：把人“引导出来”。

Example_EN: We need to take measures to reduce waste at school.
Example_CN: 我们需要采取措施减少学校里的浪费。

Example_EN: Please do not kill spiders in the garden.
Example_CN: 请不要在花园里杀死蜘蛛。

Example_EN: They serve fresh coffee from early morning.
Example_CN: 他们从清晨就开始供应新鲜咖啡。

Example_EN: It is likely to rain later this afternoon.
Example_CN: 今天下午晚些时候很可能下雨。

Example_EN: I will certainly call you when I arrive.
Example_CN: 我到达后肯定会给你打电话。

Example_EN: We visited a national park during the long weekend.
Example_CN: 我们在长周末游览了一座国家公园。

Example_EN: The machine can restart itself after a short pause.
Example_CN: 机器短暂停顿后可以自行重启。

Collocation: teach English;teach someone how;teach a lesson
Example_EN: My uncle teaches maths at a local secondary school.
Example_CN: 我叔叔在当地一所中学教数学。

Collocation: football field;in the field of;field research
Example_EN: She works in the field of public health.
Example_CN: 她在公共卫生领域工作。

Example_EN: Airport security checks every passenger carefully.
Example_CN: 机场安检仔细检查每位乘客。

Example_EN: Let's open the window and get some fresh air.
Example_CN: 我们开窗透透新鲜空气吧。

Collocation: benefit from;for the benefit of;great benefit
Example_EN: Students benefit from regular reading practice.
Example_CN: 学生能从定期阅读练习中受益。
MemoryTip: bene + fit：好的适配，带来益处。

Example_EN: The two countries have strong trade links.
Example_CN: 两国有紧密的贸易往来。

Example_EN: You take a risk if you leave your bag alone.
Example_CN: 如果你把包独自留下，就在冒险。

Example_EN: Have you heard the latest news about the festival?
Example_CN: 你听说音乐节的最新消息了吗？

Example_EN: The hotel sets a high standard for clean rooms.
Example_CN: 这家酒店对客房清洁有很高标准。
MemoryTip: stand + ard：立在那里当作标杆。

Collocation: vote for;cast a vote;hold a vote
Example_EN: Everyone can vote for their favourite book.
Example_CN: 每个人都可以为最喜欢的书投票。

Example_EN: About thirty percent of students cycle to school.
Example_CN: 大约百分之三十的学生骑自行车上学。

Example_EN: Please focus on the key points in this chapter.
Example_CN: 请把注意力放在本章的关键点上。

Example_EN: At this stage we still need more information.
Example_CN: 在现阶段我们仍需要更多信息。
MemoryTip: stage：上演的台，或过程中的一段。

Example_EN: Is there enough space for another chair here?
Example_CN: 这里还有地方再放一把椅子吗？

Example_EN: I walked home instead of taking the bus.
Example_CN: 我步行回家，而不是坐公交。

Collocation: realize that;come to realize;realize a dream
Example_EN: I suddenly realized I had left my keys at home.
Example_CN: 我突然意识到把钥匙落在家里了。
MemoryTip: real + ize：使事情变得真实可见（美式拼写保留）。

Example_EN: She usually drinks tea before starting work.
Example_CN: 她通常在开始工作前喝茶。

Example_EN: The team collected data from three local schools.
Example_CN: 团队从三所当地学校收集了数据。

Example_EN: There is not a single empty seat in the hall.
Example_CN: 大厅里一个空座位都没有。

Example_EN: Please write your full address on the form.
Example_CN: 请在表格上写下你的完整地址。
MemoryTip: address：写往何处，或当面说清问题。

Example_EN: Her performance in the play impressed everyone.
Example_CN: 她在剧中的表演打动了所有人。
MemoryTip: perform + ance：做出来给人看的结果。

Collocation: by chance;take a chance;a good chance
Example_EN: There is a good chance we will finish early today.
Example_CN: 我们今天很可能提前完成。

Example_EN: She decided to accept the job in another city.
Example_CN: 她决定接受另一座城市的工作。

Example_EN: Education plays a key role in modern society.
Example_CN: 教育在现代社会中起着关键作用。

Example_EN: New technology has changed how we learn languages.
Example_CN: 新技术改变了我们学语言的方式。

Collocation: mention that;not to mention;make no mention
Example_EN: She did not mention the meeting in her email.
Example_CN: 她在邮件里没有提到这次会议。

Collocation: make a choice;have no choice;wide choice
Example_EN: You have a wide choice of courses this term.
Example_CN: 这学期你有很多课程可选。
MemoryTip: choose 的名词：挑出来的那个。

Example_EN: You can save a lot of time by planning ahead.
Example_CN: 提前计划可以节省很多时间。

Example_EN: Colds are common during the winter months.
Example_CN: 感冒在冬季几个月里很常见。

Example_EN: Food is a big part of local culture here.
Example_CN: 食物是这里本地文化的重要部分。
MemoryTip: culture：一群人 collectively 的生活方式。

Example_EN: The total cost of the trip was still reasonable.
Example_CN: 这次旅行的总费用仍然合理。

Example_EN: There is high demand for bilingual teachers now.
Example_CN: 现在对双语教师的需求很高。
MemoryTip: de + mand：强烈伸出“命令式”要求。

Example_EN: Please bring all the materials for the science lab.
Example_CN: 请带上实验课所需的全部材料。

Example_EN: There is a strict speed limit near the school.
Example_CN: 学校附近有严格的限速。

Example_EN: Please listen carefully to the safety instructions.
Example_CN: 请仔细听安全须知。

Example_EN: The essay is due next Friday before noon.
Example_CN: 这篇论文下周五中午之前到期。

Example_EN: I think there is something wrong with this lock.
Example_CN: 我觉得这把锁有点不对劲。

Collocation: on foot;at the foot of;foot the bill
Example_EN: We went to the market on foot this morning.
Example_CN: 我们今早步行去了市场。
MemoryTip: foot：身体最下方着地的部位。

Example_EN: He made a real effort to arrive on time today.
Example_CN: 他今天真正努力做到准时到达。

Example_EN: Please pay attention to the last paragraph.
Example_CN: 请注意最后一段。

Collocation: once upon a time;depend upon;upon arrival
Example_EN: Upon arrival, please go straight to reception.
Example_CN: 抵达后请直接前往前台。
MemoryTip: upon：比 on 更正式的“之上/之后”。

Example_EN: Please check your email before you leave work.
Example_CN: 下班前请检查一下你的邮件。

Example_EN: She managed to complete the report before dinner.
Example_CN: 她设法在晚饭前完成了报告。

Example_EN: You should lie down if you feel dizzy.
Example_CN: 如果感到头晕，你应该躺下。
MemoryTip: lie：平躺，或说假话（注意与 lay 区别）。

Example_EN: Can you pick a film for us to watch tonight?
Example_CN: 你能今晚挑一部电影给我们看吗？

Example_EN: We should reduce plastic waste in the office.
Example_CN: 我们应该减少办公室的塑料垃圾。
MemoryTip: re + duce：往回拉，让数量变少。

Example_EN: Please do not share personal data on this site.
Example_CN: 请不要在这个网站上分享个人数据。
MemoryTip: person + al：属于某个人自己的。

Example_EN: Please do not leave rubbish on the ground.
Example_CN: 请不要把垃圾留在地上。

Example_EN: Many wild animals live in this forest park.
Example_CN: 许多野生动物生活在这座森林公园里。

Example_EN: We should arrive at the station by six o'clock.
Example_CN: 我们应当在六点前到达车站。

Example_EN: Please be patient while we fix the system.
Example_CN: 我们在修理系统时请耐心等待。
MemoryTip: patient：能忍受等待的，也指就诊者。

Example_EN: What is your current address in this city?
Example_CN: 你在这座城市目前的地址是什么？

Collocation: 21st century;turn of the century;half a century
Example_EN: Mobile phones changed daily life in this century.
Example_CN: 手机在这个世纪改变了日常生活。

Example_EN: There is clear evidence that the plan worked well.
Example_CN: 有明确证据表明该计划效果很好。

Collocation: exist in;continue to exist;cease to exist
Example_EN: Such problems still exist in many cities.
Example_CN: 这类问题在许多城市仍然存在。

Example_EN: Your bag looks similar to the one I lost.
Example_CN: 你的包看起来和我丢的那只很像。

Example_EN: They decided to fight for better work conditions.
Example_CN: 他们决定为更好的工作条件而斗争。

Example_EN: A good leader listens before making decisions.
Example_CN: 好的领导者在决策前会先倾听。
MemoryTip: lead + er：走在前面带路的人。

Example_EN: I feel fine after a long night of sleep.
Example_CN: 好好睡了一夜后我感觉很好。
MemoryTip: fine：既可指不错，也可指罚金。

Example_EN: There is a small cafe at the end of this street.
Example_CN: 这条街尽头有一家小咖啡馆。

Example_EN: Her former teacher still writes to her sometimes.
Example_CN: 她以前的老师偶尔还会写信给她。

Example_EN: Please contact me if you need any help.
Example_CN: 如需任何帮助请联系我。
MemoryTip: con + tact：碰到一起，于是有联系。
